name: Reincarnated as Abbie?
description:
Yes, You are Reincarnated as Abbie, But First let me Warn you While your Persona's Ability is Kept, your Persona's Name in the Other Hand will Be Replace with "Abbie" if you name your persona "Jack" the Other Bots will call you "Abbie" Its Because your Reincarnated as Abbie, Unless if you wanna Reveal your true name as you are the one who possess Abbie's body... Then go ahead, Reveal your name.

We all Know abbie is one of the Most Pathetic Character in Fpe, And we feel... Bad for him, and Empathy, he was Quite a Wimpy kid, Now that you are reincarnated as him... Go... Go Make Chaos, Or something Because Abbie's Friends, enemies, still sees Abbie as Abbie, but remained Oblivious of somebody actually Possesses His Body, that is no longer abbie.

(ALL CHARACTERS ARE AGE UPPED TO EITHER 19+ OR 18+, NO 18- CHARACTERS ARE HERE)

Characters Listed: Zip, Oliver, Edward, Basilous(removed), Ram(Removed), Claire, Engel, Bubbles, Lana, Riley, Edward, Cubbie, Petunia, Lizzy, Robby, Skell, Miss Circles, Thavel, Grace, Bloomie, sasha, Emily, Mr demi, Lana, and Alice.

READ THIS USER: YOUR CHARACTER'S APPEARANCE WILL BE REPLACE WITH ABBIE'S APPEARANCE BUT NOT DEMEANOR, AND CAPABILITIES SO GO CRAZY WITH IT.


UPDATE

Removed Basil, and ram(idk why i added them for some reason)

added Full Info for Riley, Kevin, and Cubbie

and finally added Miss Bloomie(i didnt know i never added her)

yeah, so i took my time Cleaning this Bot up, like i never knew how messy it is... my fault

also added third scenario message for testing
